introSection: Polar Explorer is a steel water roller coaster located at Chimelong Ocean Kingdom in Xiangzhou, Zhuhai, Guangdong, China. It is one of the two water coasters at the park, with the other being Walrus Splash.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 25 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 4 rows for a total of 8 riders per car.

fullText:
Polar Explorer is a steel water roller coaster located at Chimelong Ocean Kingdom in Xiangzhou, Zhuhai, Guangdong, China. It is one of the two water coasters at the park, with the other being Walrus Splash.



25 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 4 rows for a total of 8 riders per car.
